between_reference_events_count: How many events are strictly between the two highlighted reference events?
Count the events strictly between the two highlighted reference events.
Among the labeled events, how many are between the two highlighted references?
How many milestone cards fall strictly between the highlighted reference events?
Count the milestones inside the highlighted interval, excluding the highlighted endpoints.
outside_reference_interval_count: How many events are before the first highlighted reference event or after the second highlighted reference event?
Count the events outside the highlighted reference interval, excluding the highlighted events.
Among the labeled events, how many are outside the two highlighted references?
How many milestone cards fall before the first highlighted reference or after the second one?
Count the milestones in the two outer timeline ranges, excluding the highlighted endpoints.
before_threshold_date_count: How many event cards are before {threshold_date_text}?
Count the event cards dated before {threshold_date_text}.
Among the visible milestone cards, how many occur before {threshold_date_text}?
How many milestones have dates earlier than {threshold_date_text}?
Count the labeled event cards with dates before {threshold_date_text}.
after_threshold_date_count: How many event cards are after {threshold_date_text}?
Count the event cards dated after {threshold_date_text}.
Among the visible milestone cards, how many occur after {threshold_date_text}?
How many milestones have dates later than {threshold_date_text}?
Count the labeled event cards with dates after {threshold_date_text}.
event_before_dated_event_label: Find the event dated {reference_date_text}. In timeline order, which event is {relative_offset_phrase} before it?
Which event card is {relative_offset_phrase} before the event dated {reference_date_text} in timeline order?
Starting from the event dated {reference_date_text}, move {relative_offset_phrase} earlier along the timeline. Which event label is there?
In the sequence of event cards, which event is {relative_offset_phrase} before the event dated {reference_date_text}?
Look at the event dated {reference_date_text}. Which labeled event is {relative_offset_phrase} before it on the timeline?
event_after_dated_event_label: Find the event dated {reference_date_text}. In timeline order, which event is {relative_offset_phrase} after it?
Which event card is {relative_offset_phrase} after the event dated {reference_date_text} in timeline order?
Starting from the event dated {reference_date_text}, move {relative_offset_phrase} later along the timeline. Which event label is there?
In the sequence of event cards, which event is {relative_offset_phrase} after the event dated {reference_date_text}?
Look at the event dated {reference_date_text}. Which labeled event is {relative_offset_phrase} after it on the timeline?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

scene:milestone_timeline.object_description: one labeled milestone timeline with dated event cards

query:between_reference_events_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of events strictly between the two highlighted reference events
query:between_reference_events_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for all counted event cards

query:outside_reference_interval_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of events in the two outer timeline ranges
query:outside_reference_interval_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for all counted event cards

query:before_threshold_date_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of event cards dated before the named date
query:before_threshold_date_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for all counted event cards

query:after_threshold_date_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer count of event cards dated after the named date
query:after_threshold_date_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for all counted event cards

query:event_before_dated_event_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the target event label string
query:event_before_dated_event_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of the target event card

query:event_after_dated_event_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the target event label string
query:event_after_dated_event_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0, y0, x1, y1] box of the target event card
